qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the Colvars Reference manual for GROMACS?
qa_pairs.answer: The Colvars Reference manual for GROMACS is available at colvars.github.io/colvars-refman-gromacs/colvars-refman-gromacs.html.

qa_pairs.question: Which publication describes using collective variables to drive molecular dynamics simulations with Colvars?
qa_pairs.answer: The publication is Fiorin et al. (2013), titled "Using collective variables to drive molecular dynamics simulations." It can be found at dx.doi.org/10.1080/00268976.2013.813594.
